title: Drip Faster
description: Change the drip rate of lava and water from dripstones
body:
# Drip faster

A mod where you can change the speed for water and lava drip.

## Config
```yaml
lavaDrip: 5.859375 # Default % (Make sure to put .0 if you want an integer)
waterDrip: 17.578125
```
To hot reload your config you can use the vannilla /reload command
